mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_stage_team (group_stage_id, team_id, win, draw, loss, points, goals_for, goals_against, goal_difference) VALUES (#{groupStageId}, #{teamId}, #{win}, #{draw}, #{loss}, #{points}, #{goalsFor}, #{goalsAgainst}, #{goalDifference})

INSERT INTO group_stage_team (group_stage_id, team_id, win, draw, loss, points, goals_for, goals_against, goal_difference) VALUES
(#{item.groupStageId}, #{item.teamId}, #{item.win}, #{item.draw}, #{item.loss}, #{item.points}, #{item.goalsFor}, #{item.goalsAgainst}, #{item.goalDifference})
